heading: Quarters and facilities for the Farm Credit Administration
label: 2251 Quarters and facilities for the Farm Credit Administration

children.heading: Location of principal office
children.label: a Location of principal office
children.text: The Farm Credit Administration shall maintain its principal office within the Washington D.C.-Maryland-Virginia standard metropolitan statistical area, and such other offices within the United States as in its judgment are necessary.

children.heading: Alternate property authorizations for System banks
children.label: b Alternate property authorizations for System banks

children.text: To lease or acquire real property in the District of Columbia or elsewhere for quarters of the Farm Credit Administration.

To construct, develop, furnish, and equip such building thereon and such facilities appurtenant thereto as in their judgment may be appropriate to provide, to the extent the Board may deem advisable, suitable, and adequate quarters and facilities for the Farm Credit Administration.
To enlarge, remodel, or reconstruct the same.
To make or enter into contracts for any of the foregoing.
To sell or otherwise dispose of any interest in property leased or acquired under the foregoing if authorized by the Board.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Board may require of the respective banks of the System, and they shall make to the Farm Credit Administration, such advances of funds for the purposes set out in this section as in the sole judgment of the Board may from time to time be advisable for the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Advances
children.label: 2 Advances
children.text: The advances of funds described in paragraph (1) shall be in addition to and kept in a separate fund from the assessments authorized in and shall be apportioned by the Board among the banks in proportion to the total assets of the respective banks, and determined in such manner and at such times as the Board may prescribe.section 2250 of this title

children.heading: Powers of banks
children.label: 3 Powers of banks
children.text: The powers of the banks of the System and purposes for which obligations may be issued by such banks are hereby enlarged to include the purpose of obtaining funds to permit the making of advances required by this section.

children.heading: Approval of board
children.label: 4 Approval of board
children.text: The plans and decisions for such building and facilities and for the enlargement, remodeling, or reconstruction thereof shall be such as is approved in the sole discretion of the Board.

children.heading: Agent for banks
children.label: 5 Agent for banks
children.text: In actions undertaken by the banks pursuant to this section, the Farm Credit Administration may act as agent for the banks.
